_meta.description: Cross-reference of CCR-measured contaminant levels vs state-specific MCLs that are stricter than federal EPA limits
notes: Some state MCLs (NJ PFOS/PFOA, NH all) are now LESS strict than 2024 federal MCLs
MA and VT use composite PFAS standards (sum of multiple compounds)
CT uses action level (2 ppt), not enforceable MCL
HI and NM: no confirmed state-specific stricter MCLs found
NJ 1,4-dioxane MCL (0.33 ppb) recommended but not yet formally adopted
federal_mcl = null means no federal MCL exists for that specific contaminant
